name: Dublin
industries: Technology European headquarters, financial services and pharmaceuticals make Dublin one of Europe's densest project markets.
intro: Dublin's docklands host the European headquarters of the world's technology industry, and those employers hire delivery talent the way their US parents do — screened on credentials, funded by generous learning budgets. Beyond tech, post-Brexit financial relocations keep adding programme roles, and the pharma corridor within commuting distance runs validation-heavy projects where formal method is mandatory. Irish salaries for certified professionals track among Europe's best. Batches are scheduled live online across the whole year at hours built for Dublin: a weekend Sat–Sun cohort and a weekday Wed–Thu cohort each week, all landing in comfortable local daytime; every upcoming date and its exact Dublin timing is listed in the schedule below. You train with an international cohort that looks like a Dublin office. Afterwards you get exam application guidance, full-length mock exams, and open trainer access for doubts until you certify.

faq.q: What are the class timings in Dublin?
faq.a: Live classes run 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM UK, which is 09:00 AM – 06:00 PM GMT+1 in Dublin. You can pick a weekend (Sat–Sun) or a weekday (Wed–Thu) cohort; each completes the course over two consecutive days.

faq.q: Is the training online or at a venue in Dublin?
faq.a: All batches are 100% live online, taught by an instructor over video with interactive exercises — there is no venue to travel to in Dublin. You need a laptop, a stable connection and a free weekend.

faq.q: Is the certificate different if I attend from Ireland?
faq.a: No. The certification is issued by the same global body regardless of where you attend from, and holds identical recognition with employers in Ireland and internationally.

faq.q: Can my employer in Dublin sponsor the course?
faq.a: Yes. We issue invoices suitable for corporate sponsorship and reimbursement, and most employers in Ireland accept them under learning and development budgets. Group pricing is available for teams.

meta.title: {course} Training in Dublin — Live Online Weekend Batches
meta.description: Live online {course} certification training for Dublin: upcoming weekend batch dates in your local time, salary data with sources, and exam cost.
